hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then changed=$(git -C /home/rno/git/Collectoria diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '^(Backend|backend|Frontend|frontend)/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[Hook Security] Ce commit touche du code Backend/Frontend. Alfred doit déclencher l Agent Security pour auditer les changements du dernier commit."}}'; fi; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then count=$(git -C /home/rno/git/Collectoria rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ $((count % 10)) -eq 0 ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"[Hook Amélioration Continue] $count commits atteints. Alfred doit déclencher l Agent Amélioration Continue pour un audit du système d agents.\"}}"; fi; fi
